key_changes: Completed subtasks increased from 36 to 77 (41 additional subtasks)
Phase progressed from 'Auth Module' to 'Integration & Verification'
Significant time gap between updates (3+ hours)
file_insights.purpose: Status tracking for automated task execution

patterns_discovered.description: 41 subtasks completed in a single session, indicating automated or batch processing
patterns_discovered.significance: High throughput suggests programmatic task execution rather than manual work

patterns_discovered.description: Moving from feature development ('Auth Module') to verification phase while adding a new phase
patterns_discovered.significance: Project evolved to include Integration & Verification as a distinct phase

patterns_discovered.description: Session 78 running for extended period (6+ hours from start time)
patterns_discovered.significance: Indicates continuous or long-running automated processes

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Status file as single source of truth
gotchas_discovered.description: All progress tracking relies on a JSON status file that could be point of failure
gotchas_discovered.impact: If status file becomes corrupted or out of sync, entire project state becomes unreliable

gotchas_discovered.description: Large jump from session 37 to 78 with major progress indicates either session numbering restart or significant time gap
gotchas_discovered.impact: Difficult to track continuous development timeline

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Worker count shows zero active workers
gotchas_discovered.description: Despite high throughput, active worker count is 0, suggesting completed work or background processes
gotchas_discovered.impact: Unclear what mechanism is executing the subtasks

approach_outcome.task_description: Verify application boots and all modules load
approach_outcome.result_summary: Application successfully boots and all modules load without errors

recommendations.recommendation: Implement redundant logging mechanism beyond status file to verify subtask completion
recommendations.rationale: Single JSON file tracking is fragile for high-volume task execution

recommendations.recommendation: Document what mechanism executes the subtasks (worker pool, event queue, scheduler)
recommendations.rationale: Active worker count of 0 is inconsistent with 41 completed subtasks

recommendations.recommendation: Clarify session numbering scheme and ensure sequential consistency
recommendations.rationale: Large jump from session 37 to 78 needs explanation for project continuity

recommendations.recommendation: Document expected phases and ensure 'Integration & Verification' is properly scoped
recommendations.rationale: Phase expansion mid-project suggests scope creep or planning adjustments needed
